home.description: Here you will find support and guidance.
home.intro_text: Hello, I am [Psychologist's Name]. I believe in creating a safe and warm space where every individual can explore themselves without judgment. My approach focuses on empowerment and developing mechanisms to face daily challenges with calm and confidence.

services.individual_desc: A personal space to share your thoughts and work together on issues of anxiety, depression, or self-improvement.
services.online_desc: Distance is not an obstacle. We conduct sessions via secure video conferencing platforms from the comfort of your home.
services.growth_desc: Focus on self-awareness and developing new skills for a more balanced and meaningful life.

bio.hero_description: I am [Psychologist's Name], a licensed Psychologist. My approach focuses on understanding the individual through the networks of their relationships.
bio.approach_text: The systemic approach I follow examines difficulties not as individual problems, but always within the context of the broader system (family, work, social environment) and its interactions.
bio.edu_psychoanalysis: [Institute Name] - Annual program 'Psychoanalytic Thinking and Practice'
bio.edu_narrative: [Institute Name] - Narrative tools and therapeutic techniques
bio.exp_volunteer: [Organization Name] - Volunteer work as a Psychologist
bio.exp_practice: Private Practice - Individual online psychological support sessions
bio.systemic_desc: It approaches the client through their family and close interpersonal relationships. Difficulties are resolved through the restructuring of relational patterns that we automatically adopt in our daily lives.
bio.systemic_tech_desc: The frequency is usually weekly. Although the process is primarily individual, joint meetings with members of the environment may be proposed if deemed necessary.
bio.quality_note: To ensure the quality of my therapeutic work, I am in continuous supervision and personal therapy.

contact.hero_subtitle: I am here to listen to whatever concerns you and support you on your journey.
contact.booking_desc: Check availability and book your online session instantly via Calendly.
contact.form_desc: If you prefer, fill out the form below and I will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.online_notice: All sessions are held exclusively via video call (Zoom, Skype, or Viber), ensuring flexibility and privacy.

blog.title: Our Blog
blog.subtitle: Discover articles about psychology and personal growth
blog.author: Author

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro_text: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you visit our website and use our services.
privacy.data_collection_text: We only collect the necessary data you provide through the contact form (Name, Email) and the Calendly booking system for the purpose of scheduling sessions.
privacy.confidentiality_text: As a psychologist, I strictly adhere to the code of ethics and professional secrecy. Any information shared during sessions remains confidential, except for the exceptions provided by law.
privacy.cookies_text: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience. You can disable cookies through your browser settings.
privacy.rights_text: You have the right to request access to, correction, or deletion of the personal data we hold. For any request, you can contact us via email.

questions.q: How long does each session last?
questions.a: Each individual session lasts 60 minutes. It is important to be on time to make the most of the therapeutic hour.

questions.q: How are the sessions conducted? Is it only online?
questions.a: Yes, sessions are conducted exclusively online via secure video conferencing platforms (Zoom, Skype, or Google Meet), allowing you to participate from the comfort of your own space.
Payment is made via bank transfer or card. Payment must be completed before the session (prepayment) to finalize your appointment.
Cancellations or changes are accepted up to 24 hours before the scheduled appointment. If canceled in less than 24 hours, the session is charged in full.
Absolutely. Research shows that online therapy is just as effective as in-person therapy, while offering greater flexibility and saving travel time.
